ab: adasun cam haip sinsi’ munhan sadu’an tesmumut, tidelaz cam han hilav mabaliv kipu’.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: mukunbu’in tupaka sinsi’ tu “maqa han tanangaus aiza ka loqe, maqa han tanhiku’ aiza ka ivut, anaka sadu.
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: mapising cak ivut, pangqa ni cak sadu ivut.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: sadu cak madia loqe’, ihan nai daza’ lukic kusbabai, usadu’an cak toqu ihan kunbu tuszoq lukic masabaq.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，我看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: maqa kumbu di ka heza zo, uma’ cin kuknav, niang cak qabas senidu naidi, manaskal cak haip mun’iti sadu.
ch: 這裡面有象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: madia nak ka sinlasasing na pasadu zaku tamatina.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: maqe moqnin na taskun cak tamatina nak mun’iti.
ch: 下次要跟我的爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
